headline: SLB Boosts Middle East Growth With Seven-Year Kuwait Innovation Deal
summary: SLB strengthens a seven-year KOC contract under AIV initiative, expanding its digital technology footprint and long-term Middle East growth opportunities.

headline: Oil Crash Masks A 2030 Supply Shock
summary:
